# Feature: MVE Line Duration & Timeline Width (Slice 1 — Audio)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-06-26 -->

## Intent

Text blocks in audio (Hörspiel) dialog lanes show WPM-based width before audio exists, then match exact clip/media duration after Generate/Upload/Record. Scene containers on audio projects follow content duration (grow and shrink), using frame-quantized structure (30 fps) and ms-accurate audio.

Roadmap: text-first MVE epic — content-driven timing for `audio` project type. Film deferred to Slice 2.

## Preconditions

- Local desktop runtime (`npm run dev:desktop`)
- Open `.scriptony` **audio** project with structure timeline and character dialog lane
- MVE enabled (local profile)

## Happy Path

- [ ] First empty text block in scene spans full scene width (not 1 s)
- [ ] Text with known word count shows width = `estimateDurationSec` (project `reading_speed_wpm` when set)
- [ ] After Upload/Record/TTS take sync, bound clip width equals media duration (e.g. 10 s → 10 s on timeline at current zoom)
- [ ] On audio project, scene structure block end matches line content end (grow when text/audio longer)
- [ ] On audio project, scene shrinks when text shortened (no audio) within frame quantization

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Multiple lines in same scene stack sequentially (orderIndex), no overlap
- [ ] `extendSceneForAudio` / resize still runs when audio exceeds scene
- [ ] Film project type unchanged in Slice 1 (no content-driven shrink)

## Regression

- [ ] Text block drag-drop between scenes still works (T32)
- [ ] Inline edit + Generate/Upload/Record menu still works
- [ ] SFX/Music/Atmo lanes unchanged

## Assumptions

- Sequential line placement only; Plus `startSec` ignored for MVP
- Structure precision = 30 fps (~33 ms); audio = ms from file/take

| 1 | `01-wpm-text-block-width.png` |
| 2 | `02-audio-exact-width.png` |

## Implementation Notes

- Slice 1 (audio only): `resolveMveLineSpan`, `scene-duration-policy`, `resizeSceneForContent`, `syncSceneDurationForMveContent`
- Text block width from WPM/min duration; scene sync on text save/create and audio bind (contentDriven)
- Film `structureDriven` + DAW lanes deferred to Slice 2
- Follow-up: `mve-empty-text-block-shell` — first empty = full scene, additional empty = 5 s shell, no shrink on empty create
- Unit tests: `resolve-mve-line-span.test.ts`, `scene-duration-policy.test.ts`, `resize-scene-for-content.test.ts`
- Files: see git diff; key paths under `src/lib/mve/` and `src/lib/structure/`
